_doc: The open-font SOURCE REGISTRY. Each entry describes WHERE open fonts come from and how far we trust it. `trust: discovery` means we may inventory and compare its fonts (a search space), NOT that we recommend them - promotion to a reviewed CorpusManifest (license-text-hashed) and then to a published verdict is a separate, reviewed step. Schema: FontSource in ../src/types.ts.

sources.name: Google Fonts
sources.licensePolicy: inferred from the repo directory the file lives in (ofl/ -> OFL-1.1, apache/ -> Apache-2.0, ufl/ -> Ubuntu Font License); not a per-family reviewed license-text hash
sources.retrieval: files fetched from raw.githubusercontent.com on the main branch; snapshots record the retrieval date (commit pinning is a known gap, see the snapshot's sourceCommit)
sources.notes: Largest broad corpus. Latin open-source families only (Noto and color fonts excluded). Discovery-only: a font being here means it exists and is comparable, never that it is a recommended substitute.
